2606.09426.title: WeaveBench: A Long-Horizon, Real-World Benchmark for Computer-Use Agents with Hybrid Interfaces
2606.09426.paper_summary: Computer-use agents (CUAs) increasingly operate in runtimes that combine visual desktop control, command-line execution, code editing, browsers, and external tools. Existing benchmarks, however, often evaluate these interfaces as separable capabilities, leaving long-horizon cross-interface orchestration under-tested. Thus, we introduce WeaveBench, a long-horizon hybrid-interface benchmark with 114 tasks across 8 real-world work domains, grounded in real user requests and publicly verifiable artifacts. Each task requires agents to combine GUI observations/actions with CLI/code operations within a single trajectory. We evaluate these tasks on a real Ubuntu desktop inside deployed CLI-agent runtimes, augmented with a minimal desktop-control plugin. We also propose a companion trajectory-aware judge that inspects deliverables, files, screenshots, logs, and action traces, while detecting shortcut behaviors such as fabricated visual evidence or hard-coded metrics. Across frontier model-runtime pairings, the best PassRate reaches only 41.2%, showing the benchmark remains far from saturated. The trajectory-aware judge further reveals that outcome-only grading substantially overestimates agent performance. Overall, WeaveBench exposes a critical gap in CUA evaluation and provides an effective testbed to measure whether agents can orchestrate GUI, CLI, and code operations across long-horizon real-world tasks.
2606.09426.paper_summary_zh: 電腦使用代理（CUAs）越來越多地在結合視覺桌面控制、命令行執行、代碼編輯、瀏覽器和外部工具的運行時中運作。 然而，現有的基準測試通常將這些介面評估為可分離的能力，導致長期跨介面的協調測試不足。因此，我們引入了 WeaveBench，一個長期混合介面基準，涵蓋 114 個任務，涉及 8 個現實世界的工作領域，基於真實用戶請求和公開可驗證的工件。 每個任務要求代理在單一軌跡中結合 GUI 觀察/行動與 CLI/代碼操作。我們在部署的 CLI 代理運行時內的真實 Ubuntu 桌面上評估這些任務，並增強了一個最小的桌面控制插件。我們還提出了一個伴隨的軌跡感知評判者，檢查交付物、文件、截圖、日誌和行動痕跡，同時檢測如製造的視覺證據或硬編碼指標等快捷行為。在前沿模型-運行時配對中，最佳通過率僅達到 41.2%，顯示基準測試仍然遠未飽和。 軌跡感知評判者進一步揭示，僅根據結果的評分大大高估了代理的性能。 總體而言，WeaveBench 揭示了 CUA 評估中的一個關鍵缺口，並提供了一個有效的測試平台，以測量代理是否能夠在長期現實世界任務中協調 GUI、CLI 和代碼操作。
2606.09426.author: Wanli Li et.al.
2606.09426.authors: Wanli Li, Bowen Zhou, Yunyao Yu, Zhou Xu, Yifan Yang, Dongsheng Li, Caihua Shan
